title: Jueshi Zhan Hun 2nd Season
synopsis:
In the Canglan Continent, strength is determined by martial spirits. Qin Nan, the young master of the Qin family, was originally a useless soul, suffering endless scorn. By chance, he awakened the soul of an ancient war god, thus defying fate. He swept through sect geniuses, overcame powerful enemies and obstacles, encountered a soulmate, used his battle spirit to break all laws, and forged a legend with his blood. From a humble young master, he rose through the ranks to become an invincible supreme celestial being who shakes the nine realms.

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
